---
title: "Connor Smith"
subtitle: "Graduate Student"
description: "University of Washington, Clinical Psychology"
image: avatar.jpg
group: alumni
order: 1
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](avatar.jpg)


:::

## About

Former MaRSS Lab honours student. Winner of the 2023 W. J. McLelland Award (Best Honours Thesis) in Psychology. 


## Contact

- {{< fa linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/connor-smith-2473b8173/)
- {{< fa globe >}} [University of Washington](https://psych.uw.edu/people/11001)
